name: QPSC Extensions
description: Extensions for the QPSC (QuPath Scope Control) microscope acquisition system, developed at LOCI, University of Wisconsin-Madison

extensions.name: QPSC - QuPath Scope Control
extensions.description: Microscope control and automated acquisition from within QuPath via Pycro-Manager
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: PPM Modality
extensions.description: Polarized light microscopy (PPM) modality plugin for QPSC multi-angle acquisition
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Tiles to Pyramid
extensions.description: Stitches acquired tile images into OME-TIFF pyramidal whole slide images
extensions.author: Michael Nelson
